exploration_notes: Fixed race condition in cycle_key/acycle_key where session key collisions during rotation could silently lose session data. The fix replaces the delegation to create() with an explicit retry loop that: (1) makes a defensive copy of session data, (2) restores it before each save attempt, (3) catches CreateError on collision and retries with a new key, and (4) only deletes the old session after the new one is persisted.
